article_title: Burnaby Council — 11.1.3. FYI - FMC - Public Electric Vehicle Charging Network Energy-Based User Fees 2026-02-24-3.pdf

briefs.title: Proposed: Burnaby to switch public EV chargers from time-based to energy-based fees
briefs.summary: Council is set to vote on a proposal to change how drivers pay at Burnaby's 73 public EV charging stations — shifting from a per-hour charge to a per-kilowatt-hour (kWh) rate, meaning you pay for the actual electricity used. The proposal also includes an idle fee to free up spots after a vehicle is fully charged.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the council decision — if you use or manage EV charging at Burnaby civic sites, new rates will apply after a 30-day notice period.

key_dates.label: Burnaby Council vote — proposed EV charging energy-based fees
